items.name: supply-chain-guard
items.description: Local supply-chain install gate for npm packages and VS Code extensions with Socket, Codex, and PI review support.

items.name: AgentForge
items.description: 通用 AI Agent 平台，基于 LangChain 与 LangGraph 构建，采用 Harness 编程模式实现。以「像素工作室」为核心交互入口，在独立命名空间内编排多 Agent 串行/并行协作；内置多种执行策略，支持知识库 RAG 多模式检索、MCP 工具与全链路可审计追踪。

items.name: ks-arkts-skills
items.description: 快手鸿蒙 AI Coding Skills

items.name: tai-audit-skill
items.description: Business-flow-first Solidity audit skill for Claude Code, with Codex-compatible install and upstream x-ray integration.

items.name: revival
items.description: 2018'de Türkiye'de kapanan bir online futbol oyununun reverse engineering + server emulator çalışması

items.name: StrataFlow-v1
items.description: 알고리즘 트레이딩 플랫폼 — FastAPI · Next.js · TimescaleDB · Elasticsearch

items.name: compass-cli
items.description: MongoDB Compass redesigned for the command line.

items.name: bamboo-culm-morphometry
items.description: R scripts for a thesis workflow analyzing Phyllostachys nigra culm geometry, aligning comparable internode regions, defining Db-based descriptors, identifying recurring section patterns, and screening connected sections under geometry-based beam and column criteria.

items.name: Podcast-Production-Suite
items.description: The Podcast Production Suite is a Claude Cowork plugin built for any solo-host, interview show, or an investigative true crime podcast. It packages every tool you need to run a weekly show: research, scripting, guest workflows, publishing, QA, and performance tracking. No context-switching, no scattered workflows. One plugin, one place.

items.name: Khayal-App
items.description: A Healthcare app helps you to analyze your symptoms using LLM. Keeps record of your health and fitness, Analyzes handwritten prescription using OCR and update medicine and medical record also helps you to make appointment with doctors nearby using your actual location and gives you clean and detailed resport.

items.name: hotel-management-api
items.description: A RESTful Hotel Management API built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB for managing staff records and menu items, featuring JWT authentication, bcrypt password hashing, and role-based staff filtering.

items.name: mystic-destiny
items.description: 古典东方命理与现代 AI 融合的占卜 H5 应用
